response.justification: Candidate has roughly 15 years of solid full-stack engineering experience, but the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, and the resume shows minimal AI/ML depth, no recognized AI products or platforms, and no evidence of director-level technical leadership, advising strategic customers, or shaping cloud/AI product direction at scale.
strengths: Long, varied engineering tenure across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Track record of community/teaching work (workshops, talks, courses) indicating ability to share insights
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products at the level the role requires
No director-level or principal IC leadership experience advising strategic customers
Limited cloud-platform strategy background; cloud experience is application-level, not platform/architecture leadership

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and products
